bias_then_nudge_001.description: 5.1m wide lane, driver positioned at ~1.4m bias, then nudges. False negative case - baseline failed to converge, preventing nudge detection.
bias_then_nudge_001.reasoning: Stable bias region visible in early frames. Baseline should converge to 1.4m to enable nudge detection.

return_to_center_001.description: Driver returns from 1.6m bias position back toward lane center (0m) before turn. Baseline should track current position, not future destination.
return_to_center_001.reasoning: TRANSITIONAL scenario - expected baseline CHANGES frame-by-frame as driver moves. See frame-specific annotations.

narrow_lane_nudge_001.description: Narrow lane (2.8-3.0m) with clear 0.4m bias. Tests lane width gating.
narrow_lane_nudge_001.reasoning: Clear stable bias despite narrow lane. Demonstrates lane width gate is too restrictive.

bias_then_nudge_002.description: 5.2-5.3m wide lane. Baseline initialized at 1.43m, frozen during tracking (frames 2-6), then converged to 0.69m after tracking. Failed to detect final nudge (frame 9).
bias_then_nudge_002.reasoning: Baseline correctly initialized at 1.43m but was frozen during critical nudge period (frames 2-6) due to object tracking. After tracking ended, baseline dropped to 0.69m, missing subsequent nudge.
key_insights: Baseline frozen at 1.43m during frames 2-6 (is_tracking_object=true)
Peak at frame 6: 3.26m deviation at 2.5m ahead
After tracking ended (frame 7+), baseline converged to 0.69m
Frame 9: Another nudge attempt (peak ~1.12m at 32m) - FAILED TO DETECT
Demonstrates baseline locking during tracking prevents adaptation

out_of_lane_nudge_001.description: 4.2-4.4m lane. After passing intersection, ego nudges out of lane to avoid obstacle. Baseline frozen at 0.77m during entire maneuver due to tracking and out_of_lane_state.
out_of_lane_nudge_001.reasoning: Baseline correctly initialized at 0.77m but remained frozen throughout frames 2-6 due to object tracking and out-of-lane state. Peak reached 3.21m at frame 5.
key_insights: Baseline initialized at 0.77m in frame 1
Frozen at 0.77m during frames 2-6 (is_tracking_object=true)
out_of_lane_state_active from frames 2-5, returned to lane in frame 6
Peak at frame 5: 3.21m deviation at 1m ahead
Demonstrates baseline freezing during out-of-lane maneuvers prevents adaptation

bias_cyclist_nudge_001.description: 3.5-3.8m narrow lane. Cyclist nudge candidate. Baseline disabled (lane too narrow). Bias ~0.6m. Peak deviation ~1.07m at 34m in frame 1, approaching ego over frames. Frame 5: ego at peak of nudge with out-of-lane state.
bias_cyclist_nudge_001.reasoning: Baseline disabled due to narrow lane (<4m). Consistent ~0.6m bias in near-field. Nudge peak 1.065m at 34m (frame 1), progresses toward ego. Frame 5 peak near ego (0.95m) with tracking and out-of-lane active.
key_insights: Lane too narrow for adaptive baseline (3.5-3.8m), baseline DISABLED all frames
Consistent ~0.6m bias in near-field across frames
Frame 3: tracking starts (is_tracking_object=true)
Frame 4: nudge begins, peak at 1.023m at 22.6m ahead
Frame 5: ego at nudge peak (0.95m at ~1.7m), out_of_lane_state_active=true
Frame 6: moving back, far-field shows rising deviation to 1.64m at 60m
Demonstrates narrow lane case where baseline gating prevents bias correction

wide_lane_bias_nudge_001.description: Very wide lane (~6.8-6.9m). Baseline ENABLED at ~1.58m, frozen during tracking (frames 2-6). Very large peak deviation ~3.81m at ~28m (frame 3). Turn cutoff progressively reduces detection range (56 to 21 points). Junction approaching in later frames.
wide_lane_bias_nudge_001.reasoning: Wide lane enables adaptive baseline. Baseline initialized at 1.58m (frame 1), then frozen at 1.573m during tracking. Peak deviation 3.81m at 28m (frame 3), approaches ego. Current_window contaminated in frames 5-6 (3.76m, 3.61m) but EMA frozen correctly.
key_insights: Very wide lane (~6.8-6.9m) with baseline ENABLED and applied at ~1.58m
Baseline frozen at 1.573m from frame 2 onward (tracking active)
Frame 1: baseline initialized, 56 points available
Frame 3: peak at 3.811m at 28m, trajectory begins shortening
Frame 4: nudge begins approaching ego, only 40 points (turn cutoff)
Frame 5: ego at nudge peak (3.777m at 2m), only 24 points
Frame 6: moving back, junction cutoff at 19m, only 21 points
Current_window contaminated in frames 5-6 but EMA correctly frozen
Demonstrates wide lane baseline + freeze behavior during large nudge

narrow_lane_nudge_002.description: Narrow lane (~3.5-3.9m). Baseline DISABLED all frames. Small initial deviations (0.1-0.2m) growing to large nudge peak ~2.41m at ego in frame 7. 8 frames showing full nudge lifecycle. Frame 6: tracking starts. Frame 7: out_of_lane + peak. Frame 8: returning, curvy road detected.
narrow_lane_nudge_002.reasoning: Baseline disabled (narrow lane). Small bias ~0.1-0.2m. Nudge grows from far-field (frame 2-4) to near ego (frame 5-7). Peak 2.414m at 2m in frame 7. Demonstrates gradual nudge approach in narrow lane without baseline correction.
key_insights: Narrow lane (~3.5-3.9m), baseline DISABLED all frames
Frames 1-3: small deviations (0.1-0.4m), nudge growing in far-field
Frame 4: nudge clearly visible, peak ~2.4m at 60m, growing toward ego
Frame 5: begin nudge - peak visible in mid-field (~2.42m at 40m)
Frame 6: tracking starts (is_tracking_object=true), peak ~2.47m at 28m
Frame 7: nudge peak at ego (2.414m at 2m), out_of_lane_state_active=true
Frame 8: returning to lane, declining from 2.14m, curvy road detected
Demonstrates full nudge lifecycle: far-field detection to ego pass-through

bias_then_nudge_003.description: Medium-wide lane (~4.4m). Baseline ENABLED, initialized at ~1.79m in frame 1, frozen during tracking/out-of-lane in frames 2-3. Peak ~3.34m at 20m (frame 1) approaching ego to ~3.05m at 10m (frame 3, begin nudge). 3 frames showing nudge approach with active baseline.
bias_then_nudge_003.reasoning: Baseline enabled (~4.4m lane), initialized at ema=1.789 in frame 1. Frozen at 1.789 during tracking (frames 2-3). Peak moves from ~3.34m at 20m to ~3.05m at 10m. After baseline subtraction, effective nudge ~1.3m. Demonstrates baseline freeze during active tracking.
key_insights: Medium-wide lane (~4.4m), baseline ENABLED all frames
Frame 1: baseline initialized at ema=1.789, peak ~3.34m at 20m
Frame 2: tracking starts, out_of_lane active, baseline frozen at ema=1.789/final=1.769, peak ~3.28m at 18m
Frame 3: begin nudge, baseline frozen at ema=1.789/final=1.762, peak ~3.05m at 10m
Baseline freeze prevents adaptation to nudge pattern
cpp_frame_count stays at 1 (frozen, no updates after init)

bias_then_nudge_004.description: Wide lane (~5.1-5.2m). Baseline ENABLED, converging from 1.34m to 1.22m over 34 frames. No tracking/out-of-lane (baseline continuously updated). Peak ~1.91m at 35m (frame 1) approaching ego to ~1.88m at 2m (frame 5, nudge peak). 5 frames showing nudge approach with continuously updating baseline.
bias_then_nudge_004.reasoning: Baseline enabled (~5.1-5.2m lane), continuously updating (not frozen). EMA converges from 1.338 to 1.215 over 34 frames. Peak moves from 1.913 at 35m (frame 1) to 1.875 at 2m (frame 5). After baseline subtraction, effective nudge ~0.66m. Demonstrates baseline convergence with continuous updates.
key_insights: Wide lane (~5.1-5.2m), baseline ENABLED and continuously updating
Frame 1: baseline init at ema=1.338, peak ~1.913 at 35m
Frame 2: ema=1.258 (frame_count=8), peak ~1.896 at 29m
Frame 3: ema=1.238 (frame_count=11), peak ~1.901 at 22m
Frame 4: begin nudge, ema=1.237 (frame_count=14), peak ~1.871 at 14m
Frame 5: nudge peak, ema=1.215 (frame_count=34), peak ~1.875 at 2m
Baseline not frozen (no tracking, no out_of_lane), was_updated=true all frames
Turn cutoff detected in DGPS (frames 2-5) but far away (>117m), no impact
